prompt: Create a stylized artwork of a bird combining the vibrant, splashy coloring and expressive energy from image 1 with the intricate, patterned details and structured form from image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a stylized artwork of a bird. The bird should incorporate the intricate, detailed patterns and structured, full-body form seen in image 2. Apply the vibrant, multi-colored, and splashy watercolor aesthetic along with the expressive, energetic brushwork from image 1 to render the bird's design.
objects: intricate detailed patterns on the bird
